hooks.command: jq -r '.input // empty' 2>/dev/null | grep -qi 'please make a commit' && (cd /Users/mangesh/Desktop/agentic/portfolio && sed -i '' "s/\*\*Last Updated:\*\*.*/\*\*Last Updated:\*\* $(date '+%Y-%m-%d | %I:%M %p')/" commit.md && git add commit.md && git commit -m 'Daily update' && git push origin main) || true
